About

Strategy first. Results always.

I founded Digiket Solutions in 2024 with a simple observation: too many good businesses have great products and invisible brands. They don't need more posts. They need a system.

Every engagement follows the same discipline. Diagnose the real problem. Build the system that fixes it. Measure the result in revenue — within 60 to 90 days.

Before founding the agency, I completed my MBA in Marketing & Business Analytics at the National School of Business, Bangalore, and trained in the industry as a social media strategist. Today, Digiket serves clients across hospitality, F&B, fitness, D2C, beauty, automotive and real estate.

Revenue over vanity metrics Diagnose before you prescribe Speed is a strategy Own the outcome
Results

Four brands. Four turnarounds.

Real campaigns, verified numbers. Each one started with a problem and ended with revenue the client could see.

01 · F&B / Hospitality · South Goa · 90 days

The café that came back

A market-leading café had fallen from ₹90L to ₹20L a month. We repositioned the brand, retrained the staff and built a content engine with 12+ creators. Over 1M engagements — with zero paid media.

₹20L → ₹56L+180% in 90 days

02 · Resort F&B · Bangalore · 60 days

Full house, empty tables

A business resort with full rooms and loss-making restaurants. We gave the F&B outlets their own brand identity and scaled content from 3 to 20+ assets a month. Dining inquiries grew 10×.

Loss → Break-evenin 60 days

03 · Boutique resort · Goa · 60 days

6,000 followers. Zero bookings.

An audience existed — the system to convert it didn't. We built a 24/7 WhatsApp booking funnel and redesigned Instagram for conversion. 114 qualified leads and 27% less OTA dependency, on ₹0 ad spend.

₹3.2Ldirect bookings, 60 days

04 · Restaurant · Goa · 90 days

Great food, zero visibility

A loved seafood restaurant that tourists couldn't find online. We rebuilt Google Maps, Instagram and the delivery platforms as one discovery system — and reached the #1 local ranking on ₹12K total ad spend.

₹45L / monthon ₹12K ad spend
+0%Best revenue turnaround
60–90Days to results
1M+Engagements, one campaign
₹0Ad spend on two of four wins

Philosophy
"A great product alone will not save a declining brand. Visibility has to be built around it — and virality is engineered, never accidental."

— The thesis behind every Digiket engagement
